notes: Round 6 — reordered video to match article r2 reorder. 4 scenes: survey dashboard/create options (0-18s), editor (25-38s), share link+QR (43-64s), presentations page (65-78s). Boot cut 7.5s. No freeze detection (iframe content). VO uses Liam only (AKB-19). Supersedes Llv1wXSpm5c (r5b). Old videos m6fRdEv3Cqg, LXRHtEqirN0, Llv1wXSpm5c should be deleted from YouTube Studio.

steps.display_text: Open Surveys in the left menu to see your survey dashboard. From here, start from an idea with AI, pick a template, or build from scratch. AhaSlides lets you mix Multiple Choice, Rating Scale, Open-ended, and Matrix questions on the same form.
steps.tts_text: Open Surveys in the left menu to see your survey dashboard. From here, start from an idea with AI, pick a template, or build from scratch. AhaSlides lets you mix Multiple Choice, Rating Scale, Open-ended, and Matrix questions on the same form.

steps.display_text: Inside the editor, add as many questions as you need. Each saves automatically as a draft. When ready, publish — the status switches to Published and it is open for responses.
steps.tts_text: Inside the editor, add as many questions as you need. Each saves automatically as a draft. When ready, publish — the status switches to Published and it is open for responses.

steps.display_text: Share it as a standalone link or QR code. Copy the link and send it anywhere — email, Slack, or a meeting invite. Download the QR as a PNG and your audience scans it on any phone, no account needed.
steps.tts_text: Share it as a standalone link or QR code. Copy the link and send it anywhere — email, Slack, or a meeting invite. Download the QR as a PNG and your audience scans it on any phone, no account needed.

steps.display_text: For live sessions, add a Survey slide to your presentation. When you reach it while presenting, the full survey appears on every participant's device at once — all questions on one page, scroll to answer, and submit.
steps.tts_text: For live sessions, add a Survey slide to your presentation. When you reach it while presenting, the full survey appears on every participant's device at once — all questions on one page, scroll to answer, and submit.
